textByHashes.ce25fb330747ebd3b50ca8570946a3f308bbde7c: Why yes, I am. Have I become that well known?
textByHashes.b54cf489ff22b317208fea9dc36c013b0fc85b0f: Ah, you mean Rind? Great to hear from the little fellow again. Can I see it please?
textByHashes.38181650f88bfa067af7108d3664784ac625f2b7: Most enlightening. Please give him my regards next time you see him, I look forward to the next conference.
textByHashes.a820ef9316a45134dc98f8b45ab874b587e292db: I do have delphinium seeds, yes - but to spare, I'm not so sure. You don't look like that much of a gardener to me.
textByHashes.e302c5f9e397e3f171f28d6296afc702a2d8f0b9: Ah, now that I like the sound of. So people are saying I'm an expert, then?
textByHashes.48d201938cc714ffffebda36daf83feac76ded98: Really?!? Well, give me any more of that kind of talk and I'll give you something to remember me by, and I'll tell you now that it ain't seeds!!
textByHashes.b5b1a2bb2cb24747cd42d803383d55f359335561: What?!? Any more of that talk and it'll be curtains for you, mate!
textByHashes.9521ff8369afa91671ad834d519804a7cf18bb3d: I can't say that I'm surprised, really - I do seem to have the golden touch with the old gardening lark. Only just the other day I managed to grow a - I'm not boring you, am I?
textByHashes.901cdb75429dbec9e0cda80629f1b6d8ca504ab2: As a matter of fact I will! I'm not wasting my time on the likes of you!
textByHashes.9628b363d0044086174705e7ae36dea16d61800a: You do! That's the first person I've ever met has said that! Well, don't you worry mate, I've got millions of 'em!
textByHashes.ffbce0caf869c7dde472d9ac1577f98c94698723: Ah, but there's plenty of time for stories. You wanted delphinium seeds, did you say?
textByHashes.fc2edee2e6a9976494bd0547c2376ec9d79346a5: As I'm in an especially good mood I think I will let you have some. But you have to do something for me first.
textByHashes.4ea0551a6335c2101f3482b7d4c78d7ed4d9c961: I need some marigolds to give to Lyra, one of my fellow gardeners over in Morytania. She's a bit mysterious, and has some - well - sinister ways to be sure, but she's just my type.
textByHashes.48aa8bbe33f241375d2a3d5d7f5d6c42f3cf8b9d: Yes, and while I'm at it I can see how good a gardener you are. Grow those marigolds in this flower patch here from seed to flower, pick them and give them to me, and I'll give you some delphinium seeds.
textByHashes.1e6caf0bf3763c0dac136cd04b8d4192f08c92c8: Ah, fantastic - Lyra will surely be mine now! Here you go mate, here's those delphinium seeds you were after. Yes, here you go – I hope they grow for you.
textByHashes.faad7a08ee0f6d5ced183ceca06eb58f133ecb88: Have it your own way, mate. No seeds for you then.
textByHashes.312293ee9d74c81a175816d0ac68773e0288e759: Strange - there's this funny buzzing in my head that says that I should - but I don't think I will. I need those marigolds for Lyra.
textByHashes.b55553cb80203561ef51f9c622293314c74dc3f4: Hang on, I didn't see you growing any marigolds! I want them grown here, in this patch.
textByHashes.a744bcbc8e5f5c09cb8ae3eb3492f728880afe8f: Do you want those seeds or not?
textByHashes.abac010860956f00e355600adb053c3759a52f83: Ah, fantastic - Lyra will surely be mine now! Here you go mate, here's those delphinium seeds you were after.
textByHashes.279f54201972c5aeb134fe71184a737875443a9a: Yes, here you go - I hope they grow for you.
textByHashes.951c4a27abedd8108ccc6f118b78d51faeba6e82: I need some marigolds so that I can woo Lyra. Grow them from seed to flower in this flower patch here, pick them and give them to me, and I'll give you some delphinium seeds.
textByHashes.e88bf060401f84ed5c41e72ee7e5a966d988501f: I can't believe you're asking me to do that! I asked you to grow some marigolds for me, not for me to look after them for you! No, I won't look after them!
textByHashes.d2679f77a3d0d59366e3533a86c9a2adb4d804a2: I would give you some, but you don't appear to have room to carry them.
